class_variables.name: cdk8s_grafana.AccessType.DIRECT
documentation: Access directly (via server or browser in UI).

Mode for accessing a data source.

:see: https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/provisioning/#example-data-source-config-file

classes.name: cdk8s_grafana.Dashboard

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.Dashboard.__init__
documentation:
---
param data_source_variables: 'Specify a mapping from data source variables to data
  source names. This is only needed if you are importing an existing dashboard''s
  JSON and it specifies variables within an "\_\_inputs" field. Default: - no data
  source variables'
param folder: 'Group dashboards into folders. Default: - default folder'
param id: '-'
param json_model: All other dashboard customizations.
param labels: 'Labels to apply to the kubernetes resource. When adding a dashboard
  to a Grafana instance using `grafana.addDashboard`, labels provided to Grafana will
  be automatically applied. Otherwise, labels must be added manually. Default: - no
  labels'
param namespace: 'Namespace to apply to the kubernetes resource. When adding a dashboard
  to a Grafana instance using `grafana.addDashboard`, the namespace will be automatically
  inherited. Default: - undefined (will be assigned to the ''default'' namespace)'
param plugins: Specify plugins required by the dashboard.
param refresh_rate: 'Auto-refresh interval. Default: - 5 seconds'
param scope: '-'
param time_range: 'Time range for the dashboard, e.g. last 6 hours, last 7 days, etc.
  Default: - 6 hours'
param title: Title of the dashboard.
---

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.Dashboard.add_plugins
documentation:
Adds one or more plugins.

```
param plugins

```

A Grafana dashboard.

:see: https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/http_api/dashboard/

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DashboardProps.title
documentation: Title of the dashboard.

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DashboardProps.data_source_variables
documentation:
Specify a mapping from data source variables to data source names.

This is only needed if you are importing an existing dashboard's JSON
and it specifies variables within an "\_\_inputs" field.

```
default

no data source variables
```

Example:

```
{ DS_PROMETHEUS: "my-prometheus-ds" }
```

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DashboardProps.folder
documentation:
Group dashboards into folders.

:default: - default folder

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DashboardProps.json_model
documentation:
All other dashboard customizations.

:see: https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/json-model/

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DashboardProps.labels
documentation:
Labels to apply to the kubernetes resource.

When adding a dashboard to a Grafana instance using `grafana.addDashboard`,
labels provided to Grafana will be automatically applied. Otherwise,
labels must be added manually.

```
default

no labels
```

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DashboardProps.namespace
documentation:
Namespace to apply to the kubernetes resource.

When adding a dashboard to a Grafana instance using `grafana.addDashboard`,
the namespace will be automatically inherited.

```
default

undefined (will be assigned to the 'default' namespace)
```

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DashboardProps.plugins
documentation: Specify plugins required by the dashboard.

:default: - 5 seconds

classes.name: cdk8s_grafana.DataSource

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DataSource.__init__
documentation:
---
param access: Access type of the data source.
param description: 'Description of the data source. Default: - no description'
param id: '-'
param labels: 'Labels to apply to the kubernetes resource. When adding a data source
  to a Grafana instance using `grafana.addDataSource`, labels provided to Grafana
  will be automatically applied. Otherwise, labels must be added manually. Default:
  - no labels'
param name: Name of the data source.
param namespace: 'Namespace to apply to the kubernetes resource. When adding a data
  source to a Grafana instance using `grafana.addDataSource`, the namespace will be
  automatically inherited. Default: - undefined (will be assigned to the ''default''
  namespace)'
param scope: '-'
param type: Type of the data source.
param url: 'URL of the data source. Most resources besides the ''testdata'' data source
  type require this field in order to retrieve data. Default: - default url for data
  source type'
---

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.DataSource.name
documentation: Name of the data source.

A Grafana data source.

:see: https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/provisioning/#example-data-source-config-file

  namespace)'
param type: Type of the data source.
param url: 'URL of the data source. Most resources besides the ''testdata'' data source
  type require this field in order to retrieve data. Default: - default url for data
  source type'
---

Namespace to apply to the kubernetes resource.

When adding a data source to a Grafana instance using `grafana.addDataSource`,

Most resources besides the 'testdata' data source

classes.name: cdk8s_grafana.Grafana

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.Grafana.__init__
documentation:
---
param admin_password: 'Default admin password. Default: "secret"'
param admin_user: 'Default admin username. Default: "root"'
param default_data_source: 'Default data source - equivalent to calling `grafana.addDataSource`.
  Default: - no data source added'
param id: '-'
param image: 'Specify a custom image for Grafana. Default: "public.ecr.aws/ubuntu/grafana:latest"'
param ingress: 'Create an ingress to provide external access to the Grafana cluster.
  Default: true'
param labels: 'Labels to apply to all Grafana resources. Default: - { app: "grafana"
  }'
param namespace: 'Namespace to apply to all Grafana resources. The Grafana Operator
  must be installed in this namespace for resources to be recognized. Default: - undefined
  (will be assigned to the ''default'' namespace)'
param require_login: 'Require login in order to view or manage dashboards. Default:
  false'
param scope: '-'
param service_type: 'Type of service to be created (NodePort, ClusterIP or LoadBalancer).
  Default: ClusterIP'
---

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.Grafana.add_dashboard
documentation:
Creates a dashboard associated with a particular data source.

By default,
labels are automatically added so that the data source is detected by
Grafana.

```
param id



param title

Title of the dashboard.

param data_source_variables

Specify a mapping from data source variables to data source names. This is only needed if you are importing an existing dashboard's JSON and it specifies variables within an "__inputs" field. Default: - no data source variables

param folder

Group dashboards into folders. Default: - default folder

param json_model

All other dashboard customizations.

param labels

Labels to apply to the kubernetes resource. When adding a dashboard to a Grafana instance using grafana.addDashboard, labels provided to Grafana will be automatically applied. Otherwise, labels must be added manually. Default: - no labels

param namespace

Namespace to apply to the kubernetes resource. When adding a dashboard to a Grafana instance using grafana.addDashboard, the namespace will be automatically inherited. Default: - undefined (will be assigned to the 'default' namespace)

param plugins

Specify plugins required by the dashboard.

param refresh_rate

Auto-refresh interval. Default: - 5 seconds

param time_range

Time range for the dashboard, e.g. last 6 hours, last 7 days, etc. Default: - 6 hours
```

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.Grafana.add_data_source
documentation:
Adds a data source.

By default, labels are automatically added so that
the data source is detected by Grafana.

```
param id



param access

Access type of the data source.

param name

Name of the data source.

param type

Type of the data source.

param description

Description of the data source. Default: - no description

param labels

Labels to apply to the kubernetes resource. When adding a data source to a Grafana instance using grafana.addDataSource, labels provided to Grafana will be automatically applied. Otherwise, labels must be added manually. Default: - no labels

param namespace

Namespace to apply to the kubernetes resource. When adding a data source to a Grafana instance using grafana.addDataSource, the namespace will be automatically inherited. Default: - undefined (will be assigned to the 'default' namespace)

param url

URL of the data source. Most resources besides the 'testdata' data source type require this field in order to retrieve data. Default: - default url for data source type
```
A Grafana instance.

methods.name: cdk8s_grafana.GrafanaProps.__init__
documentation:
---
param admin_password: 'Default admin password. Default: "secret"'
param admin_user: 'Default admin username. Default: "root"'
param default_data_source: 'Default data source - equivalent to calling `grafana.addDataSource`.
  Default: - no data source added'
param image: 'Specify a custom image for Grafana. Default: "public.ecr.aws/ubuntu/grafana:latest"'
param ingress: 'Create an ingress to provide external access to the Grafana cluster.
  Default: true'
param labels: 'Labels to apply to all Grafana resources. Default: - { app: "grafana"
  }'
param namespace: 'Namespace to apply to all Grafana resources. The Grafana Operator
  must be installed in this namespace for resources to be recognized. Default: - undefined
  (will be assigned to the ''default'' namespace)'
param require_login: 'Require login in order to view or manage dashboards. Default:
  false'
param service_type: 'Type of service to be created (NodePort, ClusterIP or LoadBalancer).
  Default: ClusterIP'
---

default
